title: easyr1-npu sub-project metadata
description: Schema for output/<slug>/PROJECT.json. Each independent sub-project (PoC, port, integration) under output/ must conform.

schema_version.description: Bump when this schema changes incompatibly.

kind.description: What this sub-project delivers. poc = proof-of-concept on NPU; port = upstream-version port artifact bundle; integration = end-to-end stack with image; harness = tooling/skill bundle; audit = investigation result.

status.description: active = work in progress; complete = goals met, still maintained; blocked = waiting on upstream; archived = superseded.

source.description: Where this work was derived from (upstream repo + ref, or another sub-project).

upstream_prs.description: Open / merged upstream PRs that this sub-project produced or addresses.

kb_cookbooks.description: Path(s) under docs/_meta/kb/porting_lessons/ that this sub-project produced.

skill_changes.description: Skill modifications under src/skills/ produced by this sub-project.

completed.description: ISO date when status flipped to complete. null while active.
